title: Textron (TXT) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Textron's (TXT) total Q1 revenues of $3,024 million miss the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.8%. However, the reported figure increases 0.8% year over year.

title: Textron (TXT) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Textron (TXT) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.05 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.95 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.88 per share a year ago.

title: Textron Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) today reported first quarter 2023 net income of $0.92 per share, as compared to $0.88 per share in the first quarter of 2022. Adjusted net income, a non-GAAP measure that is defined and reconciled to GAAP in an attachment to this release, was $1.05 per share for the first quarter of 2023, compared to $0.97 per share in the first quarter of 2022. “In the quarter, we saw revenue growth at Aviation, Industrial and Systems,” said Textron C.

title: Will Textron Stock See Higher Levels Post Q1?
text: We expect TXT stock to trade higher post-Q1, with its revenue and earnings expected to exceed the street estimates.

title: Textron Aviation celebrates milestone 400th delivery for Cessna Citation CJ4 Gen2
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation today announced the delivery of its 400th Citation CJ4 series aircraft to Koch Holdings of Easton, Pennsylvania. This milestone delivery for the Cessna Citation CJ4 series reinforces the Citation family as the world's most popular line of business jets and demonstrates the company's commitment to continued innovation for customers as exemplified in the latest Citation CJ4 Gen2 aircraft. Cessna Citation jets are designed and manufactured by Textro.

title: GAO Sides With Textron On Boeing-Sikorsky Protest
text: The FLRAA helicopter contract is important for Textron Inc. to offset lower V-22 sales in the coming years. The Textron bid always seemed like the stronger one.

title: Will Textron (TXT) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Textron (TXT) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Should Value Investors Buy Textron (TXT) Stock?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: Lisa Atherton Named President & CEO of Bell
text: PROVIDENCE, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) today announced that Lisa Atherton has been named president & CEO of the Bell segment, effective April 28, 2023. Atherton, most recently the chief operating officer of Bell, succeeds Mitch Snyder, who will be retiring after more than seven years as president & CEO of Bell and nearly 20 years with the company. Atherton served as president & CEO of Textron Systems from 2017 until January 2023 when she was named COO at Bell.

title: The Best Defense Stocks For Today — And The Future
text: The best defense stocks have long-term programs as well as footholds in key emerging priorities for the Pentagon and U.S. allies.

title: Textron: An Overlooked Aviation and Defense Growth Stock
text: The aviation and defense industry can be difficult to assess due to its contract-based structure, geopolitical exposure and huge capital expenditures that may or may not pay off. As shown by cases such as the that of Boeing's ( BA , Financial) 737 Max, a high-profile failure can lead to years of underperformance and financial losses for a company in this industry.

title: Here's A Better Pick Over Textron Stock
text: We believe that Boeing stock (NYSE: BA) is currently a better pick than Textron stock (NYSE: TXT﻿) despite being the more expensive of the two, trading at 1.9x trailing revenues compared to 1.1x for Textron﻿﻿.
